---
title: "get_franchise_name"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_franchise_name()`

Get Franchise Name from ID

## Usage

```r
get_franchise_name(franchise_id, token = "FLIX_PATROL")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `franchise_id` | Character. The FlixPatrol franchise ID (e.g., "frn_STNa2GEw54ahWxJsXNgBMmt0"). |
| `token` | Character. The name of the environment variable containing the API key. |

## Value

A character string containing the franchise title.

## Description

Retrieves the human-readable franchise title associated with a specific
FlixPatrol franchise ID.

## Details

This function hits the '/franchises/:id' endpoint. It is used to resolve
IDs found in data tables back into readable titles for reporting or
visualization.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
get_franchise_name("frn_STNa2GEw54ahWxJsXNgBMmt0")
# [1] "Indiana Jones"

## End(Not run)
```
